creator: k5@cheerful.com
text:
fixing "X manpage" error with XFree86-4 on bento.
	MAINTAINER does not respond for 10 days.

Fix: files/patch-aa was splitted into patch-a[ab]
	new file: files/patch-ab
How-To-Repeat: 	w3m -dump http://bento.freebsd.org/errorlogs/errorlogs/e.4.20001204/ \|
	grep 'X manpage'
